nasb.text: The men of the city went out and fought against Joab, and some of the people among David’s servants fell; and Uriah the Hittite also died.

esv.text: And the men of the city came out and fought with Joab, and some of the servants of David among the people fell. Uriah the Hittite also died.

cnv.text: 城裡的人出來，與約押交戰。大衛的僕人中有一些倒斃了，赫人烏利亞也死了。

ccb.text: 敌人出来迎战，大卫的军中有几位阵亡，赫人乌利亚也死了。
